recommended_next_bounded_engineering_tas: Implement conversation intent/evidence request schema validators and watchlist bundle skeletons without network automation
m8r04_disposition: M8R-04 requires scope revision or split; watchlist bundles and minimum market-pulse source expansion should precede broad AI automation

phases.name: Conversation contracts
phases.deliverable: Implement reviewed intent, evidence request, bundle schema validators

phases.name: Watchlist bundles
phases.deliverable: Build bounded snapshot/performance packages from existing EOD/MIS sources

phases.name: Minimum market pulse
phases.deliverable: Add highest priority official market-wide sources

phases.name: Dynamic evidence requests
phases.deliverable: Bounded AI-generated plans through identity and capability checks

phases.name: Conversation continuity
phases.deliverable: Reuse and invalidate prior evidence correctly

phases.name: AI-facing automation endpoint
phases.deliverable: Expose one-shot evidence acquisition to controlled AI/MCP/API client

phases.name: Final UI/product integration
phases.deliverable: Human-facing workbench after contracts and source gaps are ready

source_expansion_priorities.name: Minimum useful market pulse
items: TWSE/TPEx turnover and rolling turnover baseline
TAIFEX front-future volume and open interest
